p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { forall(x3: T0) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 and x2(x1(x3)) = x3 } = category_id_endpoints_constraint[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) }[O, M](c.dst, c.identity, c.src)
not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity) or forall(x0: O) { c.dst(c.identity(x0)) = x0 and c.src(c.identity(x0)) = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: O) { not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity) or (c.dst(c.identity(x0)) = x0 and c.src(c.identity(x0)) = x0) })
(forall(x0: O) { not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity) or c.dst(c.identity(x0)) = x0 })
(forall(x0: O) { not category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity) or c.src(c.identity(x0)) = x0 })
not forall(x0: O) { c.dst(c.identity(x0)) = x0 and c.src(c.identity(x0)) = x0 } or category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity)
exists(k0: O) { c.dst(c.identity(k0)) != k0 or c.src(c.identity(k0)) != k0 } or category_id_endpoints_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity)
exists(k0: O) { c.dst(c.identity(k0)) != k0 or c.src(c.identity(k0)) != k0 }
let w0: O satisfy { c.dst(c.identity(w0)) != w0 or c.src(c.identity(w0)) != w0 }
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x0.dst(x0.identity(x1)) = x1 }[O, M](c, w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x0.src(x0.identity(x1)) = x1 }[O, M](c, w0)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, g) = c.compose(g, f)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, f, g)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x3) != x1(x4) or x0(x2(x3, x4)) = x0(x4) } = category_compose_src_constraint[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) }[M, O](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
not category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x0: M, x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.dst(x1) } = true

(forall(x0: M) { not category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.dst(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not (c.src(x0) = c.dst(x1) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x0)) != c.dst(x0)) or not category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or c.dst(x0) != c.src(x1) or c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.dst(x1) })
not forall(x0: M, x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.dst(x1) } or category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M, k1: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1)) != c.dst(k1) } or category_compose_src_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M, k1: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1)) != c.dst(k1) }
let w0: M satisfy { exists(k0: M) { c.src(k0) = c.dst(w0) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, k0)) != c.dst(k0) } }
let w1: M satisfy { c.src(w1) = c.dst(w0) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1)) != c.dst(w1) }
c.dst(w0) = c.src(w1)
c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1)) != c.dst(w1)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1) != w1
let w2: M satisfy { c.src(w2) = c.dst(w0) and c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2)) != c.dst(w2) }
c.src(w2) = c.dst(w0)
c.dst(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2)) != c.dst(w2)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2) != w2
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, w0, w2)
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0.dst(x1) != x0.src(x2) or x0.dst(x0.compose(x2, x1)) = x0.dst(x2) }[O, M](c, w0, w2)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, g) = c.compose(g, f)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, f, g)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x3) != x1(x4) or x1(x2(x3, x4)) = x1(x3) } = category_compose_dst_constraint[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) }[M, O](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
not category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x0: M, x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.src(x0) } = true

(forall(x0: M) { not category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.src(x0) } = true })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not (c.src(x0) = c.dst(x1) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x0)) != c.src(x1)) or not category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) })
(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or c.dst(x0) != c.src(x1) or c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.src(x0) })
not forall(x0: M, x1: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.src(x0) } or category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M, k1: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1)) != c.src(k0) } or category_compose_dst_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M, k1: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1)) != c.src(k0) }
let w0: M satisfy { exists(k0: M) { c.src(k0) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, k0)) != c.src(w0) } }
let w1: M satisfy { c.src(w1) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1)) != c.src(w0) }
c.dst(w0) = c.src(w1)
c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1)) != c.src(w0)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1) != w0
let w2: M satisfy { c.src(w2) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2)) != c.src(w0) }
c.src(w2) = c.dst(w0)
c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2)) != c.src(w0)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w2) != w0
function(x0: M, x1: M) { c.dst(x0) != c.src(x1) or c.src(opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) = c.src(x0) }(w0, w2)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, g) = c.compose(g, f)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, f, g)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, g, h) = c.compose(h, g)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, g, h)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, g), h) = c.compose(h, c.compose(g, f))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, c.compose(g, f), h)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, opposite_compose[O, M](c, g, h)) = c.compose(c.compose(h, g), f)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, f, c.compose(h, g))

goal: c.compose(c.compose(h, g), f) = c.compose(h, c.compose(g, f))
opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, g), h) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, opposite_compose[O, M](c, g, h))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0, x5: T0) { x0(x3) != x1(x4) or x0(x4) != x1(x5) or x2(x3, x2(x4, x5)) = x2(x2(x3, x4), x5) } = category_assoc_constraint[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) }[M, O](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))

not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(x2) != c.dst(x1) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x2)) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1), x2) } = true

(forall(x0: M) { not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x1: M, x2: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(x2) != c.dst(x1) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x2)) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1), x2) } = true })

(forall(x0: M, x1: M) { not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x2: M) { c.src(x0) != c.dst(x1) or c.src(x2) != c.dst(x0) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x2)) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x0), x2) } = true })

(forall(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { not (c.src(x0) = c.dst(x1) and c.src(x2) = c.dst(x0) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x0), x2)) or not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) })

(forall(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { not (c.src(x0) = c.dst(x1) and c.src(x2) = c.dst(x0)) or not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x0), x2) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x2)) })

(forall(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { not category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or c.dst(x0) != c.src(x1) or c.dst(x2) != c.src(x0) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x2, x0), x1) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, x2, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1)) })

not forall(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { c.src(x1) != c.dst(x0) or c.src(x2) != c.dst(x1) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x2)) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1), x2) } or category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))

exists(k0: M, k1: M, k2: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.src(k2) = c.dst(k1) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, k1, k2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1), k2) } or category_assoc_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, opposite_compose[O, M](c))

exists(k0: M, k1: M, k2: M) { c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and c.src(k2) = c.dst(k1) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, k1, k2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1), k2) }

let w0: M satisfy { exists(k0: M, k1: M) { c.src(k0) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(k1) = c.dst(k0) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, k1)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, k0), k1) } }

let w1: M satisfy { exists(k2: M) { c.src(w1) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(k2) = c.dst(w1) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w1, k2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1), k2) } }

let w2: M satisfy { c.src(w1) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w2) = c.dst(w1) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w1, w2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1), w2) }
c.src(w1) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w2) = c.dst(w1)
c.dst(w0) = c.src(w1)
c.dst(w1) = c.src(w2)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w1, w2)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w1), w2)

let w3: M satisfy { exists(k3: M) { c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(k3) = c.dst(w3) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w3, k3)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w3), k3) } }

let w4: M satisfy { c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w4) = c.dst(w3) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w3, w4)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w3), w4) }
c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w4) = c.dst(w3)
c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0)
c.dst(w3) = c.src(w4)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w3, w4)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w3), w4)

let w5: M satisfy { c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w5) = c.dst(w3) and opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w3, w5)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w3), w5) }
c.src(w3) = c.dst(w0) and c.src(w5) = c.dst(w3)
c.src(w5) = c.dst(w3)
opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w3, w5)) != opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, w0, w3), w5)

function(x0: M, x1: M, x2: M) { c.dst(x0) != c.src(x1) or c.dst(x1) != c.src(x2) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, x1), x2) = opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, opposite_compose[O, M](c, x1, x2)) }(w0, w3, w5)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(f)), f) = c.compose(f, c.identity(c.src(f)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(f)), f)

goal: category_id_left_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))

p.c: function[T0, T2](x0: (T0, T0) -> T0, x1: T2 -> T0, x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T0 -> T2) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x1(x2(x4)), x4) = x4 } = category_id_left_constraint[T2, T0](x3, x2, x1, x0) }[M, O](opposite_compose[O, M](c), c.identity, c.src, c.dst)
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> T0, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0 -> T1) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x1(x2(x4)), x4) = x4 } = category_id_left_constraint[T1, T0](x3, x2, x1, x0) } }
not forall(x0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(x0)), x0) = x0 } or category_id_left_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(k0)), k0) != k0 } or category_id_left_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
not category_id_left_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(x0)), x0) = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: M) { not category_id_left_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(x0)), x0) = x0 })
exists(k0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(k0)), k0) != k0 }
let w0: M satisfy { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(w0)), w0) != w0 }
function(x0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, c.identity(c.src(x0)), x0) = x0 }(w0)

goal: opposite_compose[O, M](c, f, c.identity(c.dst(f))) = c.compose(c.identity(c.dst(f)), f)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[O, M](c, f, c.identity(c.dst(f)))

goal: category_id_right_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))

p.c: function[T0, T2](x0: (T0, T0) -> T0, x1: T2 -> T0, x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T0 -> T2) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4, x1(x2(x4))) = x4 } = category_id_right_constraint[T2, T0](x2, x3, x1, x0) }[M, O](opposite_compose[O, M](c), c.identity, c.dst, c.src)
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> T0, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0 -> T1) { forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4, x1(x2(x4))) = x4 } = category_id_right_constraint[T1, T0](x2, x3, x1, x0) } }
not forall(x0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, c.identity(c.dst(x0))) = x0 } or category_id_right_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
exists(k0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, k0, c.identity(c.dst(k0))) != k0 } or category_id_right_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c))
not category_id_right_constraint[O, M](c.dst, c.src, c.identity, opposite_compose[O, M](c)) or forall(x0: M) { opposite_compose[O, M](c, x0, c.identity(c.dst(x0))) = x0 } = true
